title: Rechanneled
description: A mod that reworks the channeling enchantment to be like the tridents in MC Dungeons
body:
A mod that allows the channeling enchantment to work in all weather conditions



# What *exactly* does this mod do? --- This mod changes the channeling enchantment so that it can work in any weather condition in exchange for an added delay between trident impact and lightning strike. The mod also changes the enchantment to have three levels with each level decreasing the delay. ## License --- This project is under an MIT license
